mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `user`) AS total_users, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `todo_item`) AS total_todos, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `todo_item` WHERE is_completed = 1) AS completed_todos, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `todo_item` WHERE is_completed = 0) AS active_todos, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `todo_item` WHERE is_completed = 0 AND due_date IS NOT NULL AND due_date < NOW() ) AS overdue_todos, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `todo_subtask`) AS total_subtasks, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `todo_item`) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `todo_item` WHERE is_completed = 1) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `todo_item`), 2 ) END AS completion_rate

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.created_at, COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS todo_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.is_completed = 1 THEN t.id END) AS completed_todo_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.is_completed = 0 THEN t.id END) AS active_todo_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.is_completed = 0 AND t.due_date IS NOT NULL AND t.due_date < NOW() THEN t.id END) AS overdue_todo_count, COUNT(s.id) AS subtask_count FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN `todo_item` t ON t.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN `todo_subtask` s ON s.todo_id = t.id GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.created_at ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
